Considering 11 different ionic liquids, the SMD-GIL solvation model exhibits a mean unsigned error of 0 . 4 3 \mathrm { k c a l / m o l } for 344 solvation free energies of neutral solutes and a mean unsigned error of 0 . 6 1 \mathrm { k c a l / m o l } for 431 water-to-IL transfer free energies. As these errors are similar in magnitude to those typically observed when applying continuum solvation models to ordinary liquids, we conclude that the SMD universal solvation model may be applied to ionic liquids as well as ordinary liquids.

samples.source_text: INTRODUCTION
samples.fit_text: INTRODUCTION

samples.source_text: Over the course of the last 15 years, there has been a surge of interest in the use of ionic liquids as replacements for ordinary organic solvents otherwise used as media for chemical reactions and processes.1−12 Ionic liquids are molten salts with melting temperatures below about 1 0 0 ~ ^ { \circ } \mathrm { C } ; i.e., they are constituted entirely of ions, and they exist in the liquid state at temperatures that are readily accessible, possibly including room temperature. Some factors motivating interest in ionic liquids include observed catalytic effects and/or enhanced stereoselectivity for chemical transformations, high conductiv- ity, their essentially negligible volatility, and their generally high chemical and thermal stabilities (including nonflammability). In addition, ionic liquids are widely used for separations and processing and as lubricating, dispersing, and heat transferring agents. They have several characteristics that make them environmentally friendly, although a full evaluation of that aspect requires also considering their toxicity and their energy consumption properties.13 As the number of possible ionic liquids is vast, and as they offer unique opportunities for materials design, there is considerable interest in the develop- ment of in silico approaches to predict the solubility and partitioning of solutes in individual ionic liquids in order to facilitate the selection or design of optimal combinations of cationic and anionic constituents for specific applications.14,15 Solubility and partitioning may both be predicted from free energies of solvation,16−19 and solvation effects on chemical reaction rates can also be estimated from free energies of
samples.translation_unit_text: 在过去15年间，人们对使用离子液体替代常规有机溶剂作为化学反应和过程的介质产生了浓厚兴趣。1−12 离子液体是熔点低于约1 0 0 ~ ^ { \circ } \mathrm { C } ;即它们完全由离子构成，并在易于达到的温度（可能包括室温）下以液态存在。激发对离子液体兴趣的一些因素包括：观察到的催化效应和/或化学转化中增强的立体选择性、高导电性、其基本可忽略的挥发性，以及通常较高的化学和热稳定性（包括不可燃性）。此外，离子液体广泛用于分离和加工过程，并作为润滑剂、分散剂和传热剂。它们具有若干使其环境友好的特性，尽管全面评估该方面还需考虑其毒性和能耗特性。13 由于可能的离子液体种类繁多，且它们为材料设计提供了独特机会，人们对于开发计算机模拟方法来预测溶质在单个离子液体中的溶解度和分配行为抱有极大兴趣，以便为特定应用筛选或设计最佳的阳离子和阴离子组合。14,15 溶解度和分配行为均可通过溶剂化自由能进行预测，16−19 溶剂化对化学反应速率的影响也可通过溶剂化自由能进行估算；20−24 溶剂化自由能和分配行为是本文的主题。

samples.source_text: Solubility and partitioning in ionic liquids, just as in ordinary liquids, are determined by dielectric polarization of the solvent and by specific interactions in the first solvation shell. Also similarly to ordinary liquids, ionic liquids influence chemical reactivity based on the degree to which they differentially stabilize (or destabilize) different regions of reaction coordinates associated with dissolved solutes.25,26 More generally, equilibrium coupling with a solvent may be regarded as generating a free energy surface, with the solvated surface being generated for every set of solute coordinates by adding the free energy of solvation to the gas-phase energy associated with that set of coordinates.21,24 Given the powerful tools available for the generation of accurate gas-phase potential energy surfaces,27 the similar development of accurate models for predicting free energies of solvation continues to be an important goal so that accurate predictions of chemical structure and reactivity in solution can be made.22,28−31
samples.translated_text: 与普通液体类似，离子液体中的溶解度和分配行为由溶剂的介电极化以及第一溶剂化层中的特定相互作用决定。同样，离子液体对化学反应性的影响也取决于其差异化稳定（或不稳定）溶解溶质相关反应坐标不同区域的程度。25,26 更一般地，与溶剂的平衡耦合可视为生成一个自由能面，其中溶剂化表面是通过将溶剂化自由能加到与该组坐标相关的气相能量上，为每一组溶质坐标生成的。21,24 鉴于已有强大工具可用于生成精确的气相势能面，27 开发用于预测溶剂化自由能的精确模型仍然是一个重要目标，以便能够对溶液中的化学结构和反应性进行准确预测。22,28−31

samples.source_text: In this work, we explore the degree to which ionic liquid solvation effects can be reproduced with an implicit solvation model, also often referred to as a continuum solvation model.22,28−31 The \operatorname { S M } x series of continuum solvation models have been demonstrated to provide excellent accuracy for the prediction of free energies of solvation for molecular neutral and ionic solutes in typical organic solvents.30,69,70 Importantly, the SMx models (with x = 5 { - } 8 or D) were designed to be universal, meaning that their application to any solvent is possible provided a user has measured or can estimate a handful of necessary solvent descriptors.30,71−78 We here demonstrate the extension of the SMD solvation model77 to ionic liquids, and we show how that model may even be applied to ionic liquids where solvent descriptors are not available from experiment.
samples.translated_text: 在本工作中，我们探讨了隐式溶剂模型（也常称为连续溶剂模型22,28−31）能在多大程度上复现离子液体的溶剂化效应。\operatorname { S M } x一系列连续溶剂模型已被证明在预测典型有机溶剂中分子中性及离子溶质的溶剂化自由能方面具有出色的准确性。30,69,70 重要的是，SMx 模型（带有x = 5 { - } 8或 D）被设计为通用模型，这意味着只要用户测量或能够估算出少数必要的溶剂描述符，即可将其应用于任何溶剂。30,71−78 本文展示了将 SMD 溶剂化模型77 扩展至离子液体的过程，并说明了该模型甚至可应用于那些溶剂描述符无法从实验获得的离子液体。

samples.source_text: The SMD continuum solvation model has been described in detail elsewhere,77 and we here recapitulate only those details critical to explaining its extension to ionic liquids as solvents. Like all SMx models, the SMD model computes the 298 K free energy associated with transferring a solute from the gas phase, at 1 M concentration and behaving as an ideal gas, to a liquid solution, at 1 M concentration and behaving as though infinitely dilute.79 The contributions to the free energy of solvation are divided in the SMD model into bulk-electrostatic contributions and other components. The bulk-electrostatic component is computed from the polarized continuum model80 (PCM) that self-consistently solves the Poisson equation for a nonhomogeneous medium to obtain the quantum mechanical solute charge distribution inside a molecular cavity; the calculation depends on an optimized set of cavity radii and requires the solvent dielectric constant.77 (The medium is nonhomogeneous because the dielectric constant is unity inside the cavity, where polarization is treated explicitly, and is equal to the bulk dielectric constant outside the cavity, where polarization is treated by continuum methods.) The non-bulk- electrostatic component is computed assuming characteristic contributions proportional to the exposed surface areas of solute atoms. The proportionality constants (atomic and molecular surface tensions) depend semiempirically on the atomic numbers of solute atoms, on the solute geometry, and on a small group of solvent descriptors. These descriptors are the index of refraction \mathbf { \rho } ( n ) , the macroscopic surface tension (γ), Abraham’s hydrogen bond acidity and basicity parameters for the solvent when treated as a solute ( \Sigma \alpha _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } and \dot { \Sigma } \beta _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { \scriptsize { H } } } ) , the fraction of non-hydrogen atoms that are aromatic carbon atoms ( \phi ) , and the fraction of non-hydrogen atoms that are electronegative halogen atoms \ l ( \psi ) . The functions from which the atomic or group surface tensions are computed are invariant across solvents; the surface tensions (for a given solute and solute geometry) change only as a result of changes in the macroscopic solvent descriptors, making the SMD model “universal” in the sense that it may be applied to any solvent for which the necessary descriptors are either known from measurement or may be conveniently estimated. In the case of \phi and \psi , only the molecular structure is required to
samples.translation_unit_text: SMD连续溶剂模型已在其他文献中详细描述[77]，此处仅重述对其扩展至离子液体作为溶剂至关重要的细节。与所有SMx模型类似，SMD模型计算298 K下将溶质从气相（浓度为1 M，表现为理想气体）转移至液相（浓度为1 M，表现为无限稀释）所伴随的自由能[79]。在SMD模型中，溶剂化自由能的贡献分为体相静电贡献和其他组分。体相静电分量通过极化连续模型[80]（PCM）计算，该模型自洽求解非均匀介质中的泊松方程，以获得分子空腔内的量子力学溶质电荷分布；该计算依赖于一组优化的空腔半径，并需要溶剂的介电常数[77]。（介质是非均匀的，因为空腔内部介电常数为1，极化被显式处理；空腔外部介电常数等于体相介电常数，极化通过连续方法处理。）非体相静电分量通过假设与溶质原子暴露表面积成比例的特征贡献来计算。比例常数（原子和分子表面张力）半经验地依赖于溶质原子的原子序数、溶质几何结构以及一小组溶剂描述符。这些描述符包括折射率\mathbf { \rho } ( n )、宏观表面张力（γ）、当溶剂被视为溶质时的Abraham氢键酸度和碱度参数（\Sigma \alpha _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } }和\dot { \Sigma } \beta _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { \scriptsize { H } } } )、芳香碳原子占非氢原子的比例( \phi )、以及电负性卤素原子占非氢原子的比例\ l ( \psi )。计算原子或基团表面张力的函数在不同溶剂间保持不变；表面张力（对于给定的溶质和溶质几何结构）仅随宏观溶剂描述符的变化而改变，这使得SMD模型具有“普适性”，即可应用于任何必要描述符已知（通过测量）或可方便估算的溶剂。对于\phi和\psi ,仅需分子结构即可确定必要值，但其他溶剂描述符必须通过实验或建模确定。

typst.markdown_text: 表1未包含Abraham$\\Sigma \\alpha _ { 2 } ^ { {H} }$和$\\Sigma \\beta _ { 2 } ^ { {H} }$对于任何离子液体的值，因为据我们所知，这些值尚未被测量。然而，Kamlet和Taft氢键参数90 α和$\\beta$已针对多种离子液体进行了测量。我们注意到，这两组氢键参数的区别在于：Abraham参数是根据分子作为溶质时的自由能数据确定的，而Kamlet和Taft参数则是通过其他方式针对分子作为溶剂时确定的。可以合理地预期，这两组氢键参数标度之间可能存在相关性，因此我们探讨了Kamlet和Taft参数在多大程度上可用于预测Abraham参数。具体而言，我们考虑了表2所列的19种有机溶剂，这两组参数均已针对它们确定。91−93

The anionic components include \mathrm { B F } _ { 4 } , DCA (dicyanamidate), \mathrm { N T f } _ { 2 } (bis(trifluoromethylsulfonyl)imide), OTf (trifluoromethylsulfonate), and \mathrm { P F } _ { 6 } (for convenience of notation, we take all cation positive charges and anion negative charges to be implicit in the component abbreviations or formulas). Note that dielectric constants for ionic liquids are typically determined by zero-frequency extrapolation of the solvent’s complex dielectric function determined from dielectric spectroscopy in the megahertz/gigahertz regime.

samples.source_text: Table 1 does not include Abraham \Sigma \alpha _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } and \Sigma \beta _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } values for any of the ionic liquids because, to the best of our knowledge, these values have not been measured. However, Kamlet and Taft hydrogen bonding parameters90 α and \beta have been measured for several ionic liquids. We note that the distinction between these two sets of hydrogen bonding parameters is that those of Abraham are determined from free energy data for a molecule acting as a solute while those of Kamlet and Taft are determined in other ways for a molecule when acting as a solvent. It is reasonable to expect that there might be a correlation between the two sets of scales of hydrogen bonding parameters, and therefore, we explored the degree to which Kamlet and Taft parameters might be used to predict Abraham parameters. In particular, we considered the 19 organic solvents listed in Table 2, for which both sets of parameters have been determined.91−93

typst.markdown_text: 在本研究中，我们测试了三种基于SMD溶剂化模型的计算方案。当所考虑的离子液体的所有必要溶剂描述符均可从实验中获得时（需注意，对于本文研究的任何离子液体，我们通过其与实测Kamlet−Taft参数的关联推导出“实验性”$\\Sigma \\alpha _ { 2 } ^ { {H} }$和$\\Sigma \\beta _ { 2 } ^ { {H} }$值，并利用公式1和2（见上文）计算$\\alpha$和$\\beta$值），我们即可执行“真实”的SMD计算。在此类计算中，离子液体在适用通用SMD模型方面与其他任何液体并无区别。此类计算在本文中标记为SMD。我们还将测试另一种模型，其中除$\\phi$和$\\psi$外的所有溶剂描述符均设置为上述平均（“通用”）值；此类计算将称为SMD-GIL，其中GIL表示通用离子液体。最后，我们测试一种实用的折衷方法，即使用所考虑离子液体可用的任何溶剂描述符，并用通用参数替换任何缺失的描述符；这可视为对标准SMD计算的一种实用近似，在本文中，以此方式获得的结果将标记为SMD-PGP，其中PGP表示我们使用了部分通用参数。SMD-PGP模型的理念是：任何无法从实验测量中获得的溶剂描述符，均应取所有已有测量数据的离子液体中该描述符的平均值。

samples.source_text: There are three ionic liquids in Table 3 for which all properties other than \Sigma \alpha _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } and \Sigma \beta _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } have been measured and are tabulated in Table 1, namely, [BMIM] \left[ \mathrm { B F _ { 4 } } \right] _ { i } , [BMIM] \left[ \mathrm { N T f } _ { 2 } \right] , and \mathrm { \big [ B M M \big ] } \big [ \mathrm { P F } _ { 6 } \big ] . Thus, the SMD universal solvation model can be applied without further consideration to make predictions for these three solvents using eqs 1 and 2 and the available Kamlet and Taft parameters.

samples.source_text: In the present study, we test three computational protocols based on the SMD solvation model. When all the necessary solvent descriptors for the ionic liquid under consideration are available from experiment (noting that, for any ionic liquid studied here, we derive “experimental” \Sigma \alpha _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } and \Sigma \beta _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } values from their correlations with measured Kamlet−Taft \alpha and \beta values using eqs 1 and 2, vide supra), we can perform “true” SMD calculations. In such calculations, the ionic liquid is treated no differently than any other liquid in terms of being amenable to application of the universal SMD model. Such calculations will be labeled here as SMD. We will also test the model in which all solvent descriptors except \phi and \psi are set equal to the average (“generic”) values presented above; such calculations will be called SMD-GIL, where GIL implies generic ionic liquid. Finally, we test a practical compromise method in which we use any solvent descriptors that are available for the ionic liquid under consideration and replace any missing ones with the generic parameters; this may be considered as a practical approximation to a proper SMD calculation, and in the present paper, results obtained this way will be labeled SMD- PGP, where PGP denotes that we used partial generic parameters. The philosophy of the SMD-PGP model is that any solvent descriptor that is not available from an experimental measurement shall be taken to be the average of that descriptor over all ionic liquids for which measurements are available.
samples.translated_text: 在本研究中，我们测试了三种基于SMD溶剂化模型的计算方案。当所考虑的离子液体的所有必要溶剂描述符均可从实验中获得时（需注意，对于本文研究的任何离子液体，我们通过其与实测Kamlet−Taft参数的关联推导出“实验性”\Sigma \alpha _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } }和\Sigma \beta _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } }值，并利用公式1和2（见上文）计算\alpha和\beta值），我们即可执行“真实”的SMD计算。在此类计算中，离子液体在适用通用SMD模型方面与其他任何液体并无区别。此类计算在本文中标记为SMD。我们还将测试另一种模型，其中除\phi和\psi外的所有溶剂描述符均设置为上述平均（“通用”）值；此类计算将称为SMD-GIL，其中GIL表示通用离子液体。最后，我们测试一种实用的折衷方法，即使用所考虑离子液体可用的任何溶剂描述符，并用通用参数替换任何缺失的描述符；这可视为对标准SMD计算的一种实用近似，在本文中，以此方式获得的结果将标记为SMD-PGP，其中PGP表示我们使用了部分通用参数。SMD-PGP模型的理念是：任何无法从实验测量中获得的溶剂描述符，均应取所有已有测量数据的离子液体中该描述符的平均值。

samples.source_text: SMD predictions, all of the necessary solvent descriptors for the ionic liquids involved are available from experiment (noting that, for any ionic liquid studied here, we derive “experimental” \Sigma \alpha _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } and \dot { \Sigma } \beta _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } values from the correlations with measured Kamlet and Taft \alpha and \beta values using eqs 1 and 2). Thus, the ionic liquid is treated no differently than any other liquid in terms of being amenable to application of the universal SMD model. There are three ILs for which a standard SMD calculation can be performed. For the remaining ionic liquids, for which at least one solvent descriptor is not available, we utilize the SMD-PGP protocol where any missing descriptors are replaced by the average values already noted above. Finally, the SMD-GIL protocol is applied to each ionic liquid in the table, irrespective of the availability of some solvent descriptors. SMD-PGP and SMD-GIL calculations are identical for the cases of [ \mathbf { M } _ { 3 } \mathbf { B } \mathbf { A m } ] [ \mathbf { N T f } _ { 2 } ] and \mathrm { [ M B P y ] [ B F _ { 4 } ] } because for these ionic liquids there are no measured values for any solvent descriptors other than \phi and \psi ; i.e., we must use entirely generic values. The corresponding water-to-IL transfer free energy data are presented in Table 5.

typst.markdown_text: 和$\\left[ {BMMM} \\right] \\left[ {PF} _ { 6 } \\right]$时，产生的误差大小与SMD在普通溶剂中达到的误差大致相同（表4）。也就是说，溶剂模型的普适性并未受到离子液体熔盐性质的不利影响。由于离子液体的平均溶剂描述符与这三种溶剂的测量值非常接近，SMD-GIL模型的表现与SMD和SMD-PGP非常相似，除了${\\big [ B M M \\big ]} \\big [ {BF} _ { 4 } \\big ]$，对于该溶剂仅有两个可用数据点。

samples.source_text: With respect to the remaining eight ionic liquids in Table 4, the errors are quite similar to those for the three already discussed. Interestingly, the results from the SMD-GIL model are better than those from the SMD-PGP model. One way to interpret this point would be to say that all of the ionic liquids considered here are more similar to one another than is consistent with the variation in their macroscopic descriptors. However, the MUE difference between the two models over all 11 ILs is less than 0 . 1 \ \mathrm { k c a l / m o l } , so it is difficult to assess this point in the absence of a collection of ionic liquids showing substantially greater variation from the average in one or more solvent descriptors.
samples.translated_text: 对于表4中剩余的八种离子液体，其误差与已讨论的三种离子液体非常相似。有趣的是，SMD-GIL模型的结果优于SMD-PGP模型。一种可能的解释是，此处考虑的所有离子液体彼此之间的相似性，超过了其宏观描述符变化所能反映的程度。然而，两种模型在所有11种离子液体上的平均绝对误差差异小于0 . 1 \ \mathrm { k c a l / m o l }，因此在缺乏一组离子液体（其一个或多个溶剂描述符与平均值存在显著差异）的情况下，很难对此点进行评估。

samples.source_text: There are some systematic trends that are worthy of note. For instance, when \mathrm { B F } _ { 4 } is the anion, in two cases out of three, the MUE is equal in magnitude to the MSE, meaning that every single prediction is in error in the same direction (in this case, predicting too favorable a solvation free energy in the ionic liquid). When \mathrm { P F } _ { 6 } is the anion, the error seems to be systematically in the positive free energy direction, although it is somewhat speculative to put too much weight on the only two data points measured for \mathrm { \left[ H M M \right] } \left[ \mathrm { P F } _ { 6 } \right] . Should more data be acquired in the relevant ionic liquids, it may be possible to explore these points more closely.
samples.translated_text: 存在一些值得注意的系统性趋势。例如，当\mathrm { B F } _ { 4 }作为阴离子时，在三分之二的情况下，平均绝对误差（MUE）与平均误差（MSE）在数值上相等，这意味着每一个预测的误差方向都相同（在此情况下，即预测的离子液体中溶剂化自由能过于有利）。当\mathrm { P F } _ { 6 }作为阴离子时，误差似乎系统地偏向正自由能方向，尽管仅基于针对\mathrm { \left[ H M M \right] } \left[ \mathrm { P F } _ { 6 } \right]测量的两个数据点就下结论，其推测性较强。若能在相关离子液体中获得更多数据，或许可以更深入地探讨这些要点。

samples.source_text: Turning to the case of transfer free energies, we see essentially the same trends and systematic errors as those noted above for the solvation free energies. The predicted MUEs for the water-to-IL transfer free energies are somewhat larger than are those for the directly predicted solvation free energies, but they are still within the range of typical SMD errors. The increase in magnitude may reflect increasing diversity in the larger data set of transfer free energies.

We note that the values of log P _ { \mathrm { I L / w } } predicted for DHEA and progesterone are in satisfactory agreement with available experimental data, but the \log { P _ { \mathrm { I L / w } } } values for dexamethasone predict this steroid to favor water strongly over any of the tested ionic liquids, which is not consistent with experiment, where small preferences for the ionic liquids are measured. The absolute solvation free energies predicted for dexamethasone in any of the ionic liquids or water are much more negative than are corresponding solvation free energies predicted for DHEA and progesterone. The SM8 solvation model predicts a \log { P _ { \mathrm { I L / w } } } value for dexamethasone in somewhat better agreement with experiment than do SMD or SMD-GIL (see Table 6) because all SM8 predictions are between 1 and 2 \ \log units more positive than the SMD predictions. Table 6 also presents the computed octanol−water \log { P } values which are in better agreement with available experimental data111 (within 0.5 log units) than the corresponding IL−water \log { P } values. For solvation calculations in octanol, we used the following values of octanol’s descriptors: \varepsilon = 9 . 8 6 2 9 , n = 1 . 4 2 9 5 , \gamma = 3 9 . 0 1 , \varphi = \psi = 0 , \Sigma \alpha _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } = 0 . 3 7 . , and \Sigma \beta _ { 2 } ^ { \mathrm { H } } = 0 . 4 8 (these values can be compared to those for the studied ionic liquids given in Table 1 and the text).

typst.markdown_text: 我们先前已开发了用于预测溶质在水和分子（非离子）有机溶剂中溶剂化自由能及转移自由能的溶剂化模型。这些模型与大多数其他溶剂化模型的不同之处在于，它们包含了一致优化的第一溶剂化壳层参数以及体相静电处理30,70，并且具有普适性。71−73 这些溶剂化模型的普适性体现在，它们可应用于任何具备一小套溶剂描述符的溶剂，特别是介电常数、折射率、宏观表面张力以及Abraham型酸性和碱性参数。本研究表明，这些模型可成功应用于离子液体。此外，我们获得了一套通用参数，即使对于目前尚未获得实际溶剂描述符的离子液体，该参数集也能对所有测试离子液体的溶剂化自由能给出高精度预测。后一结果揭示了离子液体溶剂化特性中一个先前未被认识的普适性，至少在本研究涵盖的范围内如此。

samples.source_text: CONCLUDING REMARKS
samples.fit_text: CONCLUDING REMARKS

samples.source_text: We have previously developed solvation models for predicting free energies of solvation and transfer for solutes in water and molecular (nonionic) organic solvents. The models differ from most other solvation models in that they include consistently optimized parameters for the first solvation shell as well as a treatment of bulk electrostatics30,70 and in that they are universal.71−73 The solvation models are universal in the sense that they may be applied to any solvent for which a small set of solvent descriptors is available, in particular dielectric constant, refractive index, macroscopic surface tension, and Abraham- type acidity and basicity parameters. The present study shows that these models may be applied successfully to ionic liquids. Furthermore, we were able to obtain a set of generic parameters that yield high accuracy for solvation free energies of all tested ionic liquids, even those for which the actual solvent descriptors are not presently available. The latter result unveils a previously unappreciated universality in the solvation characteristics of ionic liquids, at least over the range studied here.
